Master's Ledger

Häuser & Gebäude Collection

A curated archive of architectural manifestations from across the scorched realms. These structures serve as the definitive blueprints for reconstructed settlements and strategic strongholds.

Iron-Fist Bastion

A brutalist military fortification forged from volcanic iron and dark basalt. Engineered to withstand the relentless sieges of the Void-touched.

Soul-Fire Spire

The ancestral seat of the Clerics of the Flame. Its crystalline architecture channels subterranean mana into a protective celestial shield.

The Crow's Rest

A sanctuary for information brokers and weary wanderers alike. Its weathered timbers have heard secrets that could collapse entire kingdoms.

Aetheric Observatory

Perched on the edge of the world, this facility tracks the movement of astral bodies and predicts incoming planar rifts.

Pearl Abyss Sanctum

A marvel of arcane engineering, allowing air-breathers to reside comfortably within the crushing depths of the Sunken Sea.

Sands of Silence Hall

Unearthed from the dunes of the Dead Desert, this structure contains murals detailing the Great Sundering and the birth of the Rune-Lords.

Nimbus Cloud-Villas

High-altitude luxury residences designed for the merchant kings of the Aether. Requires continuous gravitational tethering to maintain stability.

Iron-Works Manufactory

The beating heart of the empire's industry. Here, raw obsidian is refined into the runic plates used in the construction of legendary armor.

© 1244 Era of Ashes - Relic & Rune Architectural Bureau
